creator: junchoon@dec.sakura.ne.jp
text:
Created attachment 256538
Poudriere build error log

Unfortunately, fails to build with the error attached.

Switching ninja to samurai didn't help.
Running `make MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes` on bare-metal engirinment without ccache didn't help, too.

Built using poudriere on:
  stable/14, amd64 at commit 5ada29ab253dcaf09bbae62e4b21e9205bd8b157

Ports tree is:
  main branch at commit e509f97867c69e81f6aad3501ef42c26f2527100
